narration: Create a plain text file named test.txt containing the text: omg you can read this have a nice day like comment and subscribe
Use the with statement to open the file: with open('test.txt') as file
Print the contents of the file using file.read()
The with statement automatically closes the file after the block is executed
Verify the file is closed by printing file.closed, which should return True
Wrap the file reading code in a try block to handle potential exceptions
Add an except block to catch FileNotFoundError exceptions
Print a message indicating the file was not found inside the except block
